metadata.description: Site-level Nigerian gas fields (fuel_type = gas only) with status, operator, and ownership context.
metadata.source: Global Energy Monitor / GreenInfo Network GOGET mirror
metadata.license: CC BY 4.0 inferred; verify before redistribution
metadata.quality_note: Verified source points; field snapshot dates from August 2023. Only 2 of 180 GOGET fields are classified gas-only -- most Nigerian gas production is associated gas from mixed fields (see Oil & Gas Fields).
metadata.label: Gas Fields

properties.operator: Shell Petroleum Development Company of Nigeria
